blocks.content: The students felt as if they had taken a stimulant, their minds becoming incredibly clear.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I surpassed my limits.
Their bodies trembled with exhilaration, a sensation they had never experienced with any other buff magic.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: The Five Great Stars are indeed considerate.
Shirone's buff was dangerous.
It was so powerful that it could even change the recipient's mind.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: He doesn't use buffs that increase power. It's an excellent educational decision.
As the demonstration ended and the buff's effect wore off, the teachers and students blinked.
It felt like waking up from a dream.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Ah…
The world seemed strangely unnatural without the refreshing sensation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's a buff that increases the density of the Spirit Zone. If you recall the feeling from a moment ago, you'll achieve good results.
How much training would it take to experience that state again?
Even so, being able to briefly experience a certain level was an incredible privilege.
Unlike the excited students, Wizard was deep in thought with a serious expression.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How about it, can you do it?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Yes.
The answer came immediately.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: But why do I need to learn this?
For the first time, she raised a question, and the students and teachers turned to look at her.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Brother, I mean, teacher.
During class, the term 'brother' was forbidden.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I know time is short. What you want is for me to grow strong enough to kill Habits.
It was to block emotional fluctuations, but this time she had crossed a line.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wizard.
I'm sorry. I wanted to convey it properly. But… it's the truth.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I want to focus on the mission's success rather than survival. I know he's not a weak opponent I can kill while worrying about my life.
Shirone remained unfazed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you really think that, solve my task as quickly as possible. That's the fastest way.
Their gazes clashed for a moment.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Alright.
Wizard sighed and cast vision magic, drawing a cross similar to the one Shirone had shown.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Force.
Effects burst above the heads of the people around.
The buff's effect was astonishing, but the speed at which she collided thoughts surpassed Shirone's.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Incredible…
It seemed like Wizard's desire to be fully recognized as a wizard was visible.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Let's apply it here.
As numerous diagonals formed at the center of the cross, the shape of the thoughts began to construct a sphere.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: That's… three-dimensional?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Truly impressive.
Even Rampa couldn't help but acknowledge it.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: Three-dimensional thinking might be due to innate awakening, but applying it to Force is a completely different matter.
That's why Shirone's reaction was even more intriguing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A mental battle between master and disciple…
Those who had the same thought remained silent even after the Force demonstration ended.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Huff. Huff.
Wizard was breathing heavily but didn't take her eyes off Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is this enough?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Excellent skill. Very well done.
Then teach me how to fight. Not running away from Satan, but how to fight.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I intended to from the beginning.
As Wizard looked puzzled, Shirone cast vision magic.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What…?
Shirone, who had constructed the same three-dimensional thinking as Wizard, spoke.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The reason I taught you utility was, of course, to increase your survival rate. But…
Wizard's face froze.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: What I really wanted to show you is this.
The teachers, who hadn't noticed due to the rapid Force, suddenly realized.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: What? What?
The buffs that were supposed to collide in order were randomly changing their sequence.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Four-dimensional…
Wizard murmured.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. Changing the sequence of batteries by transcending space means transcending time.
It was the realm of temporal perception.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Habits always has Siok by his side. If you can break the barrier of time, the mission success rate will increase dramatically.
The reason I chose the utility series is also because this method is the best for training temporal perception.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: I don't know. Can I do it?
Opening a new sense was not a matter of talent but of species.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You might fail. That's why it's a gamble, but I think it's worth investing time.
For Wizard, who absorbed teachings like a sponge, even an hour was precious.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: But I can't send her off without addressing Siok. It's a crucial issue.
Wizard, who had been thinking seriously, looked up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How long do I have?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll give you a day.
What?

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Wizard's eyes widened, but Shirone was firm in such matters.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: What?
By tomorrow morning. If you find a way, come to me.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: What?
Wizard, rolling her eyes, suddenly asked.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Can I use any method?
When Shirone nodded, she left the training ground without looking back.
With Wizard's training concluded, Shirone walked over to Amy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Did you sleep well? Your hair has grown a lot.
Ah.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ah.
Amy looked up and rubbed her short, invisible hair with her fingers.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It wasn't a buzz cut, but compared to other female teachers, it was still unimpressive.
I've been too busy to care. Shall we go out for lunch later?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: No. Wizard might change. It's better to stay at school today.
She still cared for Shirone, but her emotions were more restrained than usual.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Then at least at the school cafeteria…

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Alright.
Amy turned around hastily.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: See you then.
She disliked the contradictory feeling of rejecting him and then feeling disappointed, and she hated showing that emotion even more.
Rampa approached Shirone from behind.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: Amy seems to have a lot on her mind. The Five Great Stars are always getting attention.
That's not true. I've never thought that way…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha! Why explain to me? Everyone wants to show their best side to their loved ones. Maybe she's bothered by her short hair?
No way. I'm very proud of Amy's short hair. It's a mark of saving humanity.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: …Maybe that's the problem? Anyway, even Buddha doesn't understand a woman's heart.
Shirone couldn't deny he felt a bit guilty.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Actually, I haven't met Amy separately since coming here.
Do you doubt your feelings?

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: No. Quite the opposite. My heart races every time I see Amy. But…
If he gave his heart to her, the world's and humanity's problems would seem trivial.

blocks.speaker: Rampa
blocks.content: Indeed, it's strange to focus on work while leaving your loved one behind. Do what you think is best, but don't be too hard on yourself. Controlling your heart doesn't make the pain go away.
Watching Amy's retreating figure, Shirone pondered Rampa's words.
That night.
Shirone, Iruki, and Neide cleared out the remnants of demons in a remote village.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, Yahweh.
Since the pilgrimage began, Yahweh's name spread rapidly through people's mouths.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: A ray of light in a chaotic world, please save us.
The fact that they knew without being told deeply impressed Shirone's group.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The spread is accelerating.
One person speaks, but countless ears listen.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: It starts small but ends grand. This must be a big deal in the city.
Creating a focal point for humanity was the core of the Ultima Project, but Shirone remained cautious.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We can't be complacent. The Vatican's opposition won't be easy. It's late, so let's stay here and move to the next location at dawn.
Still, Shirone was in a good mood, ordering a drink, which was unusual for him.
Neide got tipsy.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Ah, it feels good to drink after a long time. I feel so good, I miss our Liz. Don't you, Iruki?
Though they traveled by choice, it was like a permanent separation for their partners.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Why would I miss your girlfriend?
Idiot, I mean Dorothy. You act cold but you like her.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Haha! Why explain to me? Everyone wants to show their best side to their loved ones.
Iruki changed the subject.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: How's Amy? Still busy with Wizard's training?
Neide realized.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Oh, right? You're not lonely? You should tell us what you're doing. If you say something like 'events outside perception don't exist,' I'll hit you.
Shirone chuckled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, she's fine. Training is going smoothly.
Neide put down his beer and spoke seriously.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: But shouldn't we clarify something? Like, do you want to find treasure in a dungeon or dig a tunnel…
Iruki looked at him disdainfully.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Why do you care?
It's not about curiosity! There shouldn't be secrets between us. What about you?

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Well…
As Iruki answered blandly, Neide turned to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Huh? What?
Neide realized from Shirone's evasive reaction and opened his mouth in shock.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Don't tell me…
No attachment to the secular world?

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: No, what about Amy? Did you fight again?
Even Iruki looked surprised.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Haha, it's not that. There were various reasons. Plus, I've been very busy…
Reasons, my foot.

blocks.speaker: Neide
blocks.content: Hey, Shirone! Listen to me! Just follow your instincts! If you rely on this innocent body, you'll die a lonely old man!
What body?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ouch! What are you doing?
Shirone pushed Neide away and rubbed his ear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Do you think this is some communication device? It's all me. And this isn't how it's conveyed.
But.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Do they think I'm not human?
Instincts.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Maybe I was cold.
Both Lampa and his friends were more worried about Amy, who had been waiting all this time, than about himself.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright! Let's just give it a shot.
Without even knowing what was so good about it, Shirone left the dormitory, feeling half excited.
The light in Amy's room was on.
